name: Defined Benefit Plan Excise Tax Election

eligibility.description: Available to employers maintaining defined benefit plans; making this election precludes the use of the section 4972(c)(6) exceptions for that year.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Employers can elect not to take into account contributions to a defined benefit plan when calculating the 10% excise tax on nondeductible contributions, subject to full-funding limits.
